summary: Tested 'Test My Preferences' feature - POST /api/preferences/simulate endpoint and frontend modal. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend modal displays correctly with 3 stat boxes, sample products for New Drops and Price Drops, filters applied summary, sample daily digest preview, and tips to optimize section.
test_credentials: Phone: Any 10-digit Indian number starting with 6-9 (e.g., 9876543210). Sandbox OTP auto-returned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test My Preferences feature fully implemented and tested. The POST /api/preferences/simulate endpoint accepts all preference funnel fields and returns: total_matching_products, estimated_daily_alerts with breakdown, sample_daily_digest message, filters_applied summary, new_drops/price_drops/restocks sections with sample products. Frontend TestPreferencesModal component displays all data correctly with proper styling and color-coded alert volume indicator.

backend_api.post_preferences_simulate_endpoint: PASS - Returns 200 with all required fields
backend_api.total_matching_products: PASS - Returns integer count of matching products
backend_api.estimated_daily_alerts: PASS - Returns total, breakdown (new_drops, price_drops, restocks), and frequency_impact
backend_api.sample_daily_digest: PASS - Returns formatted WhatsApp message preview
backend_api.filters_applied: PASS - Returns summary of brands, categories, sizes, price_range, keywords
backend_api.new_drops_section: PASS - Returns count, sample products, enabled flag
backend_api.price_drops_section: PASS - Returns count, sample products with dropPercent, enabled flag, threshold
backend_api.restocks_section: PASS - Returns count, sample, enabled flag, note
backend_api.filtering_logic: PASS - Strict filters return fewer products than no filters
backend_api.drop_threshold_filtering: PASS - Lower threshold finds more price drops

frontend_modal.modal_opens_on_click: PASS - Modal opens with title 'Test My Preferences'
frontend_modal.products_match_stat_box: PASS - Shows total matching products count
frontend_modal.alert_volume_stat_box: PASS - Shows Low/Medium/High with color coding (green/blue/orange)
frontend_modal.filters_applied_section: PASS - Shows brands, categories, sizes, budget
frontend_modal.new_drops_section: PASS - Shows count and sample products with images and prices
frontend_modal.price_drops_section: PASS - Shows count and sample products with discount percentages
frontend_modal.sample_daily_digest: PASS - Shows formatted WhatsApp message preview
frontend_modal.tips_to_optimize: PASS - Shows contextual tips based on filter settings
frontend_modal.close_modal_button: PASS - Modal closes with X button (data-testid='close-test-modal')

integration.filter_changes_reflected: PASS - Selecting brands/categories/sizes updates simulation results

mocked_apis.whatsapp_meta_cloud_api: SANDBOX mode - messages logged to console
